overview.value: Pothos is a fast-growing trailing plant with heart-shaped leaves. It is one of the easiest indoor plants for beginners and tolerates a wide range of rooms.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Very forgiving and quick to recover from missed watering.

light.value: Low to bright indirect light; brighter light keeps variegation stronger.

water.value: Water when the top half of the soil dries out.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Main risks are root rot from standing water and leggy growth in very low light.

fertilizer.value: Feed every 6-8 weeks in the growing season.

tips.value: Trim long vines to encourage fuller growth and root cuttings in water.
